zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Stafferton於1421年出生在英國波克夏時，他的父親William Staverton61歲，母親Elizabeth Cyfrewast52歲。他於1445年與Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt在英國波克夏結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1533年享年112歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Stafferton was born in 1421, in Berkshire, England, his father, William Staverton, was 61 and his mother, Elizabeth Cyfrewast, was 52. He married Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt in 1445, in Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1533, at the age of 112.

Il a épousé Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt en 1445, à Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1533, à l’âge de 112 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Staffertonが1421年にイギリスバークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Stavertonは61歳，母Elizabeth Cyfrewastは52歳であった。1445年にイギリスバークシュアイアでElizabeth d'Abridgecourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1533年に112歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Stafferton(이)가 1421년 영국 버크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Staverton(은)는 61세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Cyfrewast(은)는 52세였다. 그는 1445년 영국 버크실르에서 Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1533년 112세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt в 1445 г. в местности биркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1533 г. в возрасте 112 лет.
